title: Indian Navy – SSC Officer – 15 Posts
org: SSC Officer - Executive Branch (Information Technology Cadre)
applyMode: Online only (via Indian Navy Official Website - joinindiannavy.gov.in)
shortInfo: Indian Navy Recruitment 2026 offers 15 vacancies for SSC Officer posts. Eligible candidates with MSc / BE / B.Tech / M.Tech/ MCA can apply online from 16-05-2026 to 06-01-2026 through the official Indian Navy website, joinindiannavy.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: Indian Navy SSC Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Apply Online for 15 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Navy Recruitment 2026 offers 15 vacancies for SSC Officer posts. Eligible candidates with MSc / BE / B.Tech / M.Tech/ MCA can apply online from 16-05-2026 to 06-01-2026 through the official Indian Navy website, joinindiannavy.gov.in.
basic_details.post_name: SSC Officer - Executive Branch (Information Technology Cadre)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via Indian Navy Official Website - joinindiannavy.gov.in)

age_limit.age_details: Born between 01 Jan 2002 and 01 Jul 2007 (both dates inclusive)

salary_details.pay_scale: Basic Pay of Sub Lieutenant starts from Rs. 56,100/- per month + other admissible allowances

selection_process: Shortlisting based on Normalised Marks + SSB Interview + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Indian Navy official website www.joinindiannavy.gov.in when the application window opens from 16-05-2026 to 01-06-2026. Hard copy applications will not be accepted. To save time during the application submission window, candidates can fill in their details and upload documents in advance. The application once submitted is final - no request for amendments or changes will be entertained.
